name: commit
description: "Commits padronizados SAMU Operacional — gitmoji + conventional + timestamp PT-BR."

# Skill: commit (SAMU Operacional)

Formato: `<gitmoji> <tipo>(<escopo>): <descricao>_DD-MM-AA_hh-mm`

Escopos: `backend`, `web`, `mobile`, `docs`, `infra`, `db`

Ver `AGENTS.md` e `docs/05_progresso/geral/FLUXO_COMMIT_CHECKLIST.md`.
